summary: Matched several trophy/toy-mode functions and improved partial matching by replacing raw M2C-style field access with a new TyModeState struct, adding trophy data string symbols, and tightening archive/global types. The PR summary reports un_80306D14, fn_80315574, and un_80312018_OnFrame at 100%, and un_803102D0 improved from 0% to 72.38%. Changes were concentrated in src/melee/ty/toy.c, tyfigupon.c, tydisplay.c, tylist.c, headers, and GALE01 symbols.
what_changed: Implemented un_80306D14 in toy.c using TyModeState at un_804A284C; state->x0 selects sound effect 0xAA or 0xAB through lbAudioAx_800237A8.
Implemented un_80312018_OnFrame in toy.c using TyModeState; when state->x4 is nonzero it calls un_80311F5C and gm_801A4B60.
Implemented a partial un_803102D0 in toy.c that lazily loads trophy data symbols with lbArchive_LoadSymbols when un_804D6ECC is NULL.
Split the previous un_803FE678 data object in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from size 0x128 to 0xF8 and introduced explicit string symbols str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl.
Added extern declarations for str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl to toy.h for use by the archive-loading function.
Added TyModeState to src/melee/ty/types.h, replacing raw M2C_FIELD access for fields at offsets 0 and 4 in several toy/display functions.
Updated tydisplay.c to include ty/types.h and use TyModeState in un_803182D4_OnFrame and un_8031B9A4_OnFrame instead of M2C_FIELD(un_804A284C, s8*, 4).

Implemented fn_80315574 in tyfigupon.c with local placeholder structs TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner; it decrements x24 or, when zero, sets inner->x4D, clears x10, and calls HSD_GObjProc_8038FE24(HSD_GObj_804D7838).
Changed un_804D6ECC from void* to HSD_Archive* in tylist.c and added baselib/forward.h while removing baselib/gobj.h.
Cleaned several header prototypes by omitting parameter names without changing the apparent signatures.
smart_moves: The author moved from raw pointer arithmetic/M2C_FIELD access toward a named TyModeState struct, which both helped matching and made repeated state checks readable across toy.c and tydisplay.c.
Splitting the data symbol around .data:0x803FE770 exposed three concrete string symbols used by lbArchive_LoadSymbols, enabling a more faithful un_803102D0 implementation.
The lazy-load guard in un_803102D0 preserves the original pattern of loading the archive only when un_804D6ECC is NULL.
Typing un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive* instead of void* made archive ownership/use clearer and aligned with the return type of lbArchive_LoadSymbols.
For fn_80315574, small local structs with explicit padding captured only the fields needed for the match, avoiding premature over-definition of unknown trophy/figupon data layouts.
decomp_lessons: When several functions read the same global state block by offset, extract a minimal shared struct in types.h even if field names are still offset-style; this can remove M2C_FIELD noise and improve matches.
String symbol boundaries in symbols.txt can directly affect function matching, especially archive-loading code that passes string labels and output pointers to lbArchive_LoadSymbols.
It is acceptable to introduce partial placeholder structs with padding for matched fields, but evidence should remain limited to the accessed offsets until the wider layout is known.
OnFrame handlers in this ty area commonly check a mode-state flag at offset 0x4 before calling a local update function and gm_801A4B60.
Header cleanups should keep signatures consistent while reducing unnecessary parameter-name churn in declarations.

A partially matched function can still be worth landing when it creates correct symbols/types that enable future decomp progress; here un_803102D0 improved to 72.38% while other functions reached 100%.
naming_conventions: New strings use descriptive data names: str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl.
The shared state struct is named TyModeState and keeps unknown fields as offset-derived names such as x0, x4, x8, and xA.
Temporary/local data layout structs in tyfigupon.c use subsystem-specific names TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner with offset-style field names.
Unmatched or not-yet-understood functions retain address-based names such as un_80306D14, un_803102D0, and fn_80315574.
Lifecycle callbacks retain suffix conventions like _OnFrame and _OnInit, as in un_80312018_OnFrame and un_803122D0_OnInit.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replace M2C_FIELD(global, type, offset) with a cast to a minimal struct and direct field access when multiple offsets are known.
Use explicit extern symbols for adjacent data strings so compiler output matches archive-loading call operands.
Use local padded structs to force exact field offsets for small matched callbacks when full struct definitions are not available.
Preserve null-check/lazy-initialization control flow around global archive pointers.
Use precise pointer types such as HSD_Archive* when a known library function return type establishes the global's type.

review_feedback.text: The author switched the PR to draft while cleaning up pointer arithmetic and considering extracting a struct.
review_feedback.impact: The final diff reflects that cleanup by adding TyModeState and replacing some raw offset access.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that expand TyModeState fields beyond x0/x4/x8/xA or rename them semantically.
Find follow-up trophy/toy PRs matching the rest of un_803102D0 after its 72.38% state.
Search for later movement of TyFiguponData or TyFiguponInner from local tyfigupon.c typedefs into a shared header.
Check whether str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl are reused by additional archive-loading functions.
Look for other ty OnFrame functions that share the state->x4 guard plus gm_801A4B60 pattern.
